CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the patient's ability to understand verbal or non-verbal content, with hearing aid or device if used and excluding language barriers during the three-day assessment period. 1 = Rarely/Never Understands
2 = Sometimes Understands: Understands only basic conversations or simple, direct phrases. Frequently
